_comment_1: Reference devcontainer.json showing how to wire claude-bridge for autonomous Cowork operation. Copy into your project's .devcontainer/ directory and adjust as needed.
_comment_2: After the container is up, find its name with `docker ps` and add the matching mcpServers entry to your host's claude_desktop_config.json (see examples/cowork-mcp-config.json).
name: claude-bridge demo

containerEnv._comment: Anchor the bridge in a clean directory by default. Per-call cwd= overrides this; pointing CLAUDE_BRIDGE_CWD at a busy project means every dispatch pays its cold-start cost.
containerEnv._comment_2: Default to acceptEdits. Switch to bypassPermissions ONLY if the container's network / filesystem isolation is actively keeping you safe — see the official devcontainer guide.
containerEnv._comment_3: Opt in to the structured event log. Path is inside the container; the bridge creates the file on first event.

_comment_3: If you authenticate Claude Code via `claude /login`, mount ~/.claude as a volume so credentials survive container rebuilds.
